profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Edit your public-facing details and self-service security settings.
profile.avatarHint: Provide a public avatar URL. The backend will store the URL directly.
profile.avatarPreviewHint: Use an image URL that is stable and publicly reachable.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell your teammates a little about yourself.
profile.editDescription: These fields sync directly to your account profile.
profile.agentEditingUnavailable: This screen currently supports human user accounts only.
users.title: People
users.directoryHint: Select a human operator to review workspace access, role assignments, and effective permissions.
users.membershipHint: Membership state is the first trust boundary before role bundles and overrides apply.
users.permissionsHint: Permission scope is derived from role sets and targeted overrides in the current workspace.
users.noPermissions: No effective permissions were returned for this user.
users.noMembership: No workspace membership was returned for this user. Grant access to place them inside this workspace.
users.memberSince: Visible inside the current workspace scope.
users.emptyDescription: The backend returned no visible user accounts for the current tenant.
resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Resetting your password revokes existing sessions and sends you back to the sign-in flow.
resetPassword.helper: Choose a new password. Existing sessions will be revoked after the change.
